= replace_all_many


== Parameters

[cols="1,1,3"]
|===
| Name | Type | Description

| `values`
| `array`
| An array of values, each even value will be replaced with the following odd value.

|===


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.new_value = this.value.replace_all_many([
  "<b>", "&lt;b&gt;",
  "</b>", "&lt;/b&gt;",
  "<i>", "&lt;i&gt;",
  "</i>", "&lt;/i&gt;",
])

# In:  {"value":"<i>Hello</i> <b>World</b>"}
# Out: {"new_value":"&lt;i&gt;Hello&lt;/i&gt; &lt;b&gt;World&lt;/b&gt;"}
----
